app.name: Philippine Community
app.tagline: Life support for Filipinos in Japan

landing.title: Life support for Filipinos in Japan
landing.subtitle: AI and experts help with visa, social insurance, government procedures, and family matters

login.heading: Sign in
login.subheading: Sign in with your Facebook account, or with your email and password
login.signUpFailed: Sign-up failed. Please check the email address.
login.signUpAlreadyRegistered: This email address is already registered. Please use "Sign in", or reset your password if you forgot it.
login.signUpRateLimited: Email send limit reached. Please wait about an hour and try again.
login.signUpEmailSent: Confirmation email sent. Click the link in your inbox to complete sign-up.
login.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters.
login.resetTitle: Enter your registered email address. We will send a password reset link.
login.resetEmailSent: Password reset email sent. Please check your inbox.
login.resetFailed: Failed to send email. Please check your address.
login.tryWithoutLoginFailed: Could not create a guest session.

resetPassword.title: Set a new password
resetPassword.subtitle: Enter your new password below.
resetPassword.tooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters.
resetPassword.failed: Failed to update password. The reset link may have expired.

loginErrors.fbDenied: Facebook login was cancelled. Please try again.
loginErrors.fbFailed: Facebook login failed. Please try again later.
loginErrors.tooManyAttempts: Sign-in has failed several times. Please contact support.

onboarding.heading: Welcome to Novalis
onboarding.subheading: Please agree to the following before continuing.
onboarding.termsLabel: I agree to the Terms of Service
onboarding.privacyLabel: I agree to the Privacy Policy
onboarding.ageLabel: I am 18 years of age or older
onboarding.error: Could not record your registration. Please try again.

anonBanner.label: Test mode
anonBanner.body: Temporary beta session. Data will not persist if you switch browsers.

dashboard.chatCtaBody: Ask general questions about residence status, health insurance, your child's school, or government procedures — anything about life in Japan.
dashboard.articlesCtaBody: Curated articles about life in Japan — visas, insurance, schooling, taxes, and more.

conversations.title: Past consultations
conversations.subtitle: Your prior consultations. Open any to continue where you left off.
conversations.empty: No consultations yet. Tap "Start a new consultation" to begin.
conversations.loadError: Failed to load past consultations. Please try again in a moment.
conversations.deleteConfirm: Delete this consultation? This cannot be undone.

articlesList.title: Articles
articlesList.subtitle: Curated articles about life in Japan — visas, insurance, schooling, taxes, and more.
articlesList.loadError: Failed to load articles. Please try again in a moment.

restaurantsList.title: Restaurants
restaurantsList.subtitle: A hand-picked list of Filipino restaurants and grocery stores in Japan.
restaurantsList.loadError: Failed to load restaurants. Please try again later.

contact.title: Contact Novalis
contact.subtitle: Send us a question, request, or feedback. A team member will get back to you.
contact.notConfigured: The contact form is being prepared. Please check back shortly.
contact.emailFallbackLabel: If the form is not working, please email us directly:

form.subjectPlaceholder: e.g. About renewing my residence status
form.messagePlaceholder: Please describe your question or request.
form.success: Sent. A team member will get back to you.
form.errorInvalid: Please check your input (subject, message, and a valid email).
form.errorGeneric: Failed to send. Please try again in a moment.
form.anonNotice: You cannot submit the form while using the beta without signing in. Please email us directly at the address below.

chat.disclaimer: This is general information. Please consult a professional for your specific situation.
chat.escalation: Your question requires professional judgment based on your specific situation. We recommend consulting an expert. Please reach out through the contact channel below.
chat.piiBlock: Personal information (residence card number, passport number, phone number, email, etc.) cannot be sent through chat. Please rephrase your question without including personal information.
chat.tooLong: Your message is too long. Please keep it under 2000 characters.
chat.smalltalkReply: I can help with general questions about life in Japan — residence status, health insurance, your child's school, government procedures, and similar topics. Feel free to ask.

ui.title: AI Consultation
ui.subtitle: General questions about residence status, social insurance, government procedures and more.
ui.errorGeneric: Sending failed. Please try again in a moment.
ui.errorQuota: You have used up this month's free quota. Please upgrade.
ui.noExperts: No experts available right now. Please try again later.
